author: @siljrath
text: can we see one for rollable photovoltaic tech too?  like for dye based versions, buckyballs & nanotubule based versions, and others.  The types that are easier to deploy and have stronger range of deployment being more effective at shallow angles and low light... we could be coating so much in such...  not to mention hemp graphene based versions having even more emancipatory potential.
